name: Tree Appetizer Torte
recipeIngredient: 4 Packages (8 oz each) Cream Cheese, Softened
1 Cup Sun-Dried Tomatoes, Oil-Packed, Chopped and Drained
Thinly Sliced French Bread, Toasted (Brush with Olive Oil Before Toasting If Desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wet a single layer of cheesecloth and squeeze dry.
2. Line the pan with cheesecloth, allowing it to extend over the sides.
3. Beat the cream cheese and goat cheese until very creamy and smooth, about 3 minutes.
4. Layer the ingredients in the prepared pan as follows:
- 2 cups cream cheese mixture
- 5 slices provolone
- 3/4 cup pesto
- 5 slices provolone
- 1 cup cream cheese mixture
- Chopped sun-dried tomatoes
- Pine nuts
- 5 slices provolone
- Remaining 3/4 cup pesto
- 2 cups remaining cream cheese mixture
5. Fold the hanging cheesecloth over the top.
6. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
7. Unwrap the top of the mold and unmold the appetizer onto a serving platter, removing the cheesecloth.
8. Garnish with roasted red pepper circles and stars at the top, fresh basil leaves, and additional toasted pine nuts.
9. Serve with toasted French bread slices.
